# lily (mrrpmeowfurry)

> Personal site of lily - an enby trans puppygirl who likes coding, reverse
> engineering, and self-hosting.

## Pages

- [Home](https://mrrpmeowfurry.dev/): about lily, projects, and contact links

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/mrrpmeowfurry): code and projects
- [Pronouns](https://en.pronouns.page/@mrrpmeowfurry): it / its
- [Sitemap](https://mrrpmeowfurry.dev/sitemap.xml)
